calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff: Midland Funding.
Copy of an affidavit in lieu of live testimony by Jennifer Jenderseck presented in open court.
No appearance by Defendant Mihoko Katayama.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Principal $2,886.23
Interest $674.51
Costs $252.00
Attoreney Fee $721.56 for a Total of $4,534.30
Judgment was submitted and signed.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Set For Trial On Sep-04-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
